extortion.description: Oxford Parks and Rec focuses on enhancing community engagement through diverse parks, recreational programs, and events. They offer facilities such as senior activity centers, splash pads, and various township parks. Their services include organized athletics, enrichment programs, summer camps, and special community events. The intended clients are the residents of Oxford Township and families looking for recreational activities ===> Revenue: $5 Million Employees: 25 Industry: Government Data:90GB Phone Number: (248) 628-1720
